headline: Trump Dinner Gunman Sprints Security in 4SEC FLASH 💥🏃‍♂️🔫
text:
CCTV BOMB 💣📹 DROPS: Cole Tomas Allen 🏃‍♂️😈, 31yo psycho simp 🤪🔫, BURSTS outta hotel door 🚪💨 like a FLASH GORDON reject 🦸‍♂️❌ and SPRINTS 🏃‍♂️⚡ thru Secret Service checkpoint in JUST 4 SECONDS ⏱️🍆 – that's FASTER than Elon’s Cybertruck 🚀🐛 recall! While DONALD TRUMP 🍊👑 & JD VANCE 🥜🛡️ were VIBING at White House Correspondents' gala 🎉📰, this shotgun-totin' LOSER 🤡🔥 charged terrace level ONE FLOOR above the BALLROOM BASH 🏰💃, packin' SEMI-AUTO HANDGUN 🔫🍆, PUMP-ACTION SHOTGUN 🎯💥, & THREE KNIVES 🗡️🗡️🗡️ like a rejected Call of Duty skin 🎮😩!

Security HERO COP 🦸‍♂️💪 draws & BLASTS 🔥🔫 as Allen DITCHES his THICC DARK COAT 🧥🍑 (hidin' that 12-GAUGE MONSTER 📦💣) & BOLTS thru METAL DETECTOR 🛡️🚫 with HANDS GRIPPIN' GUN 👐🔫 – PROSECUTORS spill: DUDE was 'CASING' the joint 🕵️‍♂️👀 DAY BEFORE, checkin' in as GUEST 🏨😏, strollin' corridors & poppin' into GYM 💪🏋️ like 'yo I'm just here to PUMP... IRON... or HEADS 💀😂'! Secret Service AGENT takes POINT-BLANK SHOTGUN BUCKSHOT 🥜🔥 to BALLISTIC VEST 🛡️🍑 – HERO RETURNS FIRE with FIVE ROUNDS 💨🔫💥 while Allen TRIPS on MAGNETOMETER BOX 🧲🤕 & FACEPLANTS 😵‍💫🍑, lettin' AGENTS PILE ON like WWE ROYAL RUMBLE 🤼‍♂️‼️!

US ATTORNEY JEANINE PIRRO 👩‍⚖️🔥 posts HI-DEF CLIP on X 🐦📱 (Trump's UPGRADE from his blurry flex 📸😎), NO FRIENDLY FIRE BULLSH*T 🚫🤝 – Secret Service boss SEAN CURRAN 🗣️📢 on Fox: 'SUSPECT BLASTED OUR GUY POINT-BLANK RANGE 🥶🔫, but COP HERO GOATED 🐐 five shots back!' Ballistics nerds 🧑‍🔬🔍 probin' if it was ALLEN'S BUCKSHOT or friendly stray 🧐💨. Defense simps 🤡⚖️ cry 'NO PROOF he fired!' but DOJ memo: DUDE SHOT TOWARDS BALLROOM STAIRS ⬇️💥 headin' for TRUMP'S VIP ORGY 🍊👑🥂 with cabinet daddies & VANCE bro 🥜!

Trump crew RUSHED outta venue 🚀🏃‍♂️ after GUNFIRE RINGS OUT 🔊💥 – Allen cuffed & CHARGED with ASSASSINATION ATTEMPT 😈🍊, TRANSPORTIN' FIREARMS CROSS-STATE 🚗🔫 (10YR MAX 🕰️😩), & DISCHARGIN' in VIOLENCE 🎇💀 (ANOTHER 10YR SLAP 👋)! Washington Hilton turned WARZONE 🏨🔥 in SECONDS – security SWEATIN' 😰💦 but HERO AGENT NO BIGGIE, just vest ping 🛡️😤! Pirro tea: 'NO FRIENDLY FIRE' ☕🚫 – Allen's LAWYERS SALTY 🧂😭 questionin' EVERYTHING, but EVIDENCE got him LOCKED TIGHT 🔒🍆. Trump dodges ANOTHER BULLET 💨🍊 like it's his 9th life 🐱‼️ – MAGA DADDY UNTOUCHABLE 👑🤑!
